name: Deferred - Bad Reputation - 1
description: First returns for lingering suspicion and bad reputation.

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO][defer reputation 2 1d6] An old suspicion from {origin} was spoken aloud again where it could do work.
results.name: reputation-1

results.description: [defer reputation 2 1d6] What people had once muttered about you in {origin} returned in a clearer and less charitable form.
results.name: reputation-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO][defer reputation 2 1d6] Your name from {origin} still carried enough old unease to change a first impression.
results.name: reputation-1

results.description: [defer reputation 2 1d6] A reputation first earned in {origin} proved far more durable than the event that formed it.
results.name: reputation-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp][defer reputation 2 1d6] Someone from {origin} repeated an old warning about you to people who did not know you well enough to doubt it.
results.name: reputation-1

results.description: [defer reputation 2 1d6] The doubtful air that had once surrounded you in {origin} returned with fresher witnesses.
results.name: reputation-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO][defer reputation 2 1d6] A story from {origin} was retold badly, which made it more dangerous rather than less.
results.name: reputation-1

results.description: [defer reputation 2 1d6] Someone tied to {sourceTitle} remembered enough to keep trusting you difficult.
results.name: reputation-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO][defer reputation 2 1d6] The old suspicion from {origin} returned in the form of hesitation, which often does more harm than accusation.
results.name: reputation-1

results.description: [defer reputation 2 1d6] What had once made people wary of you in {origin} became newly relevant for reasons only partly fair.
results.name: reputation-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp][defer reputation 2 1d6] Your old name from {origin} arrived ahead of you and did not speak kindly.
results.name: reputation-1

results.description: [defer reputation 2 1d6] Some people had not forgotten what {origin} taught them to suspect about you, and time had made them no wiser.
results.name: reputation-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO][defer reputation 2 1d6] A stale reputation from {origin} became fresh trouble when it reached the wrong ears.
results.name: reputation-1

results.description: [defer reputation 2 1d6] What had seemed mere gossip in {origin} hardened into something closer to record.
results.name: reputation-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO][defer reputation 2 1d6] Your former reputation from {origin} proved easier to revive than to answer.
results.name: reputation-1

results.description: [defer reputation 2 1d6] An old suspicion from {origin} returned just when you most needed to be judged on newer merits.
results.name: reputation-1
